---
name: Bug
about: Report broken behavior or incorrect repository state
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Summary

Describe the bug clearly.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what currently happens.

## Impact

Explain why this matters to the repository or workflow.

## Affected Files Or Areas

List the likely impacted files, folders, or layers.

## Proposed Fix

Describe the preferred resolution if known.
